text:
Add an option to recode the movie in avi
using ffmpeg.
option added: --avi
	this options works almost the same as --title
	it extracts the title of the move and recode resulting
	an avi movie (divx + mp3)
[DESCRIBE CHANGES]

Added file(s):
- files/patch-aa
